entity_type.description: One of: experiment, project, prompt, prompt_version, test_suite, test_suite_item, trace.
entity_type.title: Entity Type

name.description: Optional substring filter on entity name. Supported for project, experiment, prompt, test_suite; ignored for sub-collections.
name.title: Name

project_id.description: Required when listing traces. UUID of the parent project.
project_id.title: Project Id

prompt_id.description: Required when listing prompt_versions. UUID of the prompt.
prompt_id.title: Prompt Id

test_suite_id.description: Required when listing test_suite_items. UUID of the suite.
test_suite_id.title: Test Suite Id
